title: Vanila Creation
description: This is a Vanila modpack with a few mods that make the world extra beautiful and realistic.
body:
Immerse yourself in a whole new way to experience Minecraft! Vanilla Creatio is based on the latest Fabric 1.21 version and extends the classic Minecraft feel with carefully selected mods that make the world more vibrant, dynamic and immersive - without destroying the original vanilla experience.
# 
**🌍 A more vibrant world**
- Terralith, Tectonic & Wilder Wild transform the landscape into stunning, natural biomes with realistic formations and lush vegetation.
- MoreMobVariants & Creeper Overhaul bring new variants of familiar creatures to the game and make the world more varied.
- Presence Footsteps & Ambient Sounds provide a realistic soundscape that immerses you even deeper into the world.
# 
**🎨 Visual & sound enhancements**
- Iris & Sodium deliver improved performance and enable shader support for even more beautiful worlds.
- Sound Physics Remastered provides realistic sound reflections and impressive acoustics.
- Skinlayers3D & NotEnoughAnimations bring your character and other entities to life with better animations and depth effects.
# 
**⚒️ Better control & comfort**
- MouseTweaks & SmoothScroll improve control and inventory management.
- Better Third Person & CameraOverhaul provide smoother camera movements and a more realistic perspective.
- ChatHeads & ChatAnimations improve chat interaction for a more immersive multiplayer experience.
# 
**📜 Advanced features & convenience functions**
- JEI, JustEnoughResources & JustEnoughProfessions help you better manage recipes and resources.
- AppleSkin shows detailed food information for better survival.
- AutoHUD & BetterF3 provide advanced debug information without cluttered displays.
# 
With Vanilla Creation you get an immersive Minecraft experience that takes the vanilla world to the next level perfect for players who want to explore a more natural, beautiful and fluid world without losing the basic gameplay.

Download the modpack, create your world and experience Minecraft like never before! ✨🌎🎮
